articles.title: Fire destroys Newbury home, kills pets as family escapes
articles.description:
Four residents escaped without injury after an early-morning fire engulfed their home, authorities say.

The post Fire destroys Newbury home, kills pets as family escapes appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Early-morning fire destroyed a home in Newbury, Massachusetts.
Four residents escaped unharmed, but their pets did not survive.
Local authorities are investigating the cause of the fire.

articles.title: How a Cambridge home cook built a 1,000-member recipe club around local ingredients
articles.description:
Cantabrigian Andrew Little started the club to localize recipes and find community.

The post How a Cambridge home cook built a 1,000-member recipe club around local ingredients appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Cambridge resident Andrew Little founded a recipe club to promote local ingredients.
The club has grown to 1,000 members since its inception.
Members share recipes, fostering community and supporting local food sources.

articles.title: Campbell to continue suit against Live Nation, as internal messages show employee mocked customers
articles.description:
Despite a deal with the DOJ, many attorneys general are promising to continue the fight against Live Nation and Ticketmaster.

The post Campbell to continue suit against Live Nation, as internal messages show employee mocked customers appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Massachusetts Attorney General Andrea Campbell continues lawsuit against Live Nation over customer treatment.
Internal messages reveal Live Nation employees mocked customers, raising concerns about service quality.
Boston residents could see changes in ticketing practices and accountability from Live Nation.
